name: Aristocrat Leisure Limited
analysis: ALL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$54.3900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$54.9500, stop A$49.5594, target A$71.1218 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
